'''Laeca Valorum''' was a [[Politics/Legends|politician]] and member of [[House Valorum/Legends|House Valorum]]. The Valorums were a highly regarded political dynasty<ref name="NEGC" /> that stretched back to over 1000 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|292-293|Valorum, Supreme Chancellor Finis}}</ref> Lists of the Valorum lineage that included [[Tarsus Valorum/Legends|Tarsus]], [[Tullius Valorum|Tullius]], and Laeca Valorum sounded like an induction list for the [[Imperial Hall of Heroes|Hall of Heroes]], a structure on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] that honored heroes of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="NEGC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Laeca Valorum was mentioned in the [[2002]] reference book ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'', written by [[Daniel Wallace]].<ref name="NEGC" />
